name: Syncom Healthcare Limited
summary: Syncom Healthcare Limited engages in the manufacture and marketing of pharmaceutical formulations in India and internationally. It also offers nutraceutical products and ayurvedic formulations. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Indore, India. Syncom Healthcare Limited is in corporate insolvency resolution process under the provisions of Section 7 of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
